channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Pool size setting that kills performance
item.description: Cut database latency 5× by ditching the threads×cores pool myth — with Node 20, PostgreSQL 16, and Prisma 5.3.1 benchmarks and fixes.

item.title: Ship proof, not code
item.description: Cut lead time to remote hire 50% by focusing on proof, not polish — build a working system with CI logs and incident reports

item.title: Non-coders shipped products in 2026
item.description: Ship production-ready apps in weeks with these 3 AI tools — real benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and the mistakes teams keep making in 2026.

item.title: Pick realtime tech in 2 minutes
item.description: Compare WebSockets vs Server-Sent Events vs long polling with 2026 latency, CPU, and cost numbers — pick the right tool in minutes.

item.title: Production RAG pipelines’ invisible bottlenecks
item.description: We expected 500 daily queries; the first traffic spike hit 12,000 in two hours after a marketing blitz.

item.title: 2026 AI salaries: prompt vs vector vs RAG
item.description: In 2026, prompt tuning pays $152k while RAG pipelines pay $210k — but only if latency stays <300 ms. Compare latency, cost, and tooling for prompt vs vector vs RAG in this data-backed breakdown.

item.title: Over-engineering costs $12k/year — here’s the fix
item.description: Cut monthly AWS bill 98% with a single-process architecture — latency dropped 86%, support tickets vanished. Real numbers from a 2025 production rebuild.

item.title: Pay raise script for remote devs in 2026
item.description: 24% average uplift for remote devs in 2026 — how to counter offers using Levels.fyi, a Python calculator, and a three-paragraph email template that closes in 11 days on average.

item.title: Cache Showdown: When Redis Fails and Memcached Wins
item.description: Cut API response time 70% with Memcached caching — connection pooling, eviction policies, and the failover mistake most teams make in 2026.

item.title: Why RAG pipelines choke under real load
item.description: Cut RAG latency 70% and AWS bills 61% by fixing connection pools, cache stampedes, and vector index timeouts. The boring details most tutorials skip.

item.title: Choose the Right Real-Time Protocol Fast
item.description: Choose SSE, WebSockets, or long polling in 2026: CPU, memory, and cost numbers for 10k clients on AWS c6g.xlarge. Benchmarks for Python 3.11 and Node 20 LTS.

item.title: Pick a freelance platform: Andela vs Toptal vs Arc in
item.description: Pick the right platform: latency, cost, and support compared for African devs in 2026 (Andela vs Toptal vs Arc). Benchmarks from Lagos, Nairobi, Cape Town.

item.title: AI coding wave: 12 stacks, 5 countries, 0 backend devs
item.description: Ship 3 real apps in 72 hours using AI agents — the 2026 stacks that actually work in production, with real costs, latency benchmarks, and the mistakes that burned $142 in tokens.

item.title: 2026 salary AI skills: test vs vector search
item.description: Cut AI spend 77% and double accuracy with prompt engineering vs vector search — the 2026 salary data, benchmarks, and code you need to decide where to invest

item.title: Stop wasting database connections
item.description: Cut API response time 60% by reducing pool size — connection pooling mistakes cost teams $8k+ monthly in wasted RDS instances and outages

item.title: Negotiate remote salary without the bank tax
item.description: Land remote jobs at US rates from anywhere — concrete numbers, fee calculators, and negotiation scripts that cut through the noise.

item.title: Simplicity wins: when over-engineering backfires
item.description: Cut monthly infra costs 96% by replacing Kafka + Redis with a simple HTTP service — latency dropped from 450 ms to 42 ms and on-call pages from 12 to 2. The real cost of over-engineering exposed.

item.title: Multi-agent systems in prod: the ugly bits
item.description: The latency between agent calls started at 800ms, then climbed to 3.2 seconds, then the whole thing locked up when the queue hit 2,150 messages.

item.title: 2026: Best dev platforms for African devs
item.description: Toptal’s US-based support was faster, but their developers in Accra were using shared VPS instances with 200ms latency to our API.

item.title: Simplicity won the race: how we killed a microservice
item.description: Cut API response time 62% by merging three services into one sidecar design — latency, cost, and error-rate numbers from a 2026 production rollout
